title: Optimalsation+
description: A modpack for Minecraft optimization. It uses all the subtleties of optimization.
body:
**Optimalsation+** is a modpack without unnecessary mods, created for everyone! This modpack stays close to vanilla gameplay but includes one non-vanilla feature:

-  **Dynamic Lighting!**
Even though vanilla Minecraft doesn’t have dynamic lighting, it simply had to be included in this modpack.

The modpack’s performance is optimized _for low-end PCs and other devices_.

|  | Neoforge | Fabric | Quilt | Forge |
|:---------------------:|:---------------------:|:---------------------:|:---------------------:|:---------------------:|
| 1.21.8 - Last | ✘ | ✘ | ✘ | ✘ |
| 1.21.7 | ✔ | ✔ | ✔ | ✘ |
| 1.21.6 - 1.14 | ✘ | ✘ | ✘ | ✘ |
